This image depicts a scattered school of fish with distinct black vertical stripes swimming over a textured rocky reef. The fish vary significantly in size due to perspective, and the complex background adds difficulty to the counting task. How many fish are in the picture?

This underwater image shows a school of long, slender, silver fish (resembling barracudas) swimming in formation against a deep blue background. The fish vary in visibility, with some clearly defined in the foreground and others fading into the distance. How many fish are in the picture?

How many fish are in the picture?

This image shows a large collection of watermelons arranged on the ground. The watermelons vary in color from dark green to light green with stripes, and there are also a few yellow melons mixed in. They are densely packed in rows with some touching each other. How many melons are in this image?

This image shows a branch of an apple tree with ripe apples hanging from it. The apples have a red-yellow coloration and are surrounded by green leaves against a light gray sky background. Some apples are clustered together while others hang individually. How many apples are on the branch?

This aerial image shows a snowy parking lot from a bird's-eye view during a snowstorm. Vehicles are covered with snow and snowflakes are falling, creating visual noise. The white parking lines are partially visible through the snow. Vehicles of various colors are parked in marked spaces with some empty spots. Green landscaping islands and crosswalk markings are visible through the snow cover. How many vehicles are in this parking lot?

This image displays a large, diverse group of people posing for a photograph against a white background. The individuals are arranged in multiple rows and are packed closely together, making counting require careful attention to each face. How many people are in the picture?

This image captures a dense crowd of spectators at a sporting event, many wearing New England Patriots gear and sunglasses. The fans are seated in stadium rows, creating layers of overlapping faces and bodies, which makes counting individual people challenging. How many people are in the picture?

The visibility drops off sharply in the background, making distant figures hard to see. How many people are in the picture?

How many vehicles are in this parking lot?
